profile.summary: I build products at the intersection of technology, research, and execution. My work spans academic exploration, product strategy, and hands-on delivery, with a focus on turning ideas into useful systems and clear user value.
highlights: Cross-disciplinary background across research, product, and engineering
Interested in AI-native products, data systems, and applied technology
Comfortable operating in both Chinese and international contexts
Focused on thoughtful execution and durable product quality
